In <italic>{Path of Exile: Siege of the Atlas}, two new Eldritch Horrors threaten to consume the Atlas of Worlds. Join Commander Kirac's militia and defend the Atlas and Wraeclast itself against these celestial foes.

This large endgame expansion contains new Atlas systems, pinnacle bosses, one gigantic Atlas passive skill tree, Eldritch implicit endgame crafting, new unique items, the Archnemesis Challenge league and much more.
Description.zh:
在2022年度资料片《异界的纷争》中，异界图鉴将面临两位上古之灵的威胁。您必须加入奇拉克的义勇军，为保卫异界图鉴和瓦尔克拉斯而战。

本次大型终局扩展将推出新的异界图鉴系统、新的最终首领、庞大的异界图鉴天赋树、古灵基底，还有全新的传奇物品和罪恶枷锁挑战赛季。

Description.en: Having assumed responsibility for the defense of the Atlas, Commander Kirac has established a base in the Karui Archipelago with several map devices. He has heard rumours of your prowess and invites you to join his militia in order to scout the Atlas to learn about threats to Wraeclast. You encounter the Maven and discover that two new Eldritch Horrors are here: The Searing Exarch and The Eater of Worlds. They must be stopped before they consume everything.
Description.zh: 指挥官奇拉克挑起了保卫异界图鉴的重担。他在卡鲁群岛布置了装置，建立了作战基地，并邀请你加入义勇军探索异界图鉴，探听敌人的虚实。随后你将从贤主口中得知了两名新的上古之灵，它们是焚界者和灭界者。你必须在一切被毁灭之前阻止它们。

Description.en: The Searing Exarch and The Eater of Worlds are the most powerful beings that Wraeclast has ever seen. The path to defeating them involves exploring many influenced maps and slaying their formidable subordinates, The Black Star and The Infinite Hunger, yielding valuable rewards.
Description.zh: 焚界者和灭界者是瓦尔克拉斯从未见过的强敌。要打败它们，需要探索许多受其影响的地图，消灭它们的仆从，其中包括漆黑之星和无限饥渴。虽然敌人十分可怕，但回报也十分可观。

Description.en: Most Atlas mechanics have been reworked with a goal of creating deeper systems that are easier to understand. Regions have been removed, so your Atlas specialisation affects every map you run. Where you'd previously collect 16 Watchstones, you must now earn four Voidstones which let you raise the tier of all maps on your Atlas until they are uniformly tier 16. Sextants can apply to Voidstones and be itemised and traded. Commander Kirac offers a large variety of Atlas objectives that add valuable content to your maps.
Description.zh: 我们重做了绝大多数异界图鉴机制，目的是为了让其更加深入简出。我们移除了异界国度，所以异界图鉴的特化机制现在会影响你跑过的每张地图。现在也不需要像过去一样搜集16个守望石，而是改为用四个虚空石就可以提高所有异界图鉴的地图位阶。它们同样可以添加六分仪，也可以归入列表并且进行交易。指挥官奇拉克会在地图上添加大量有价值的异界目标。

Description.en: Say goodbye to regional Atlas Passive Trees and hello to one gigantic Atlas-wide Passive Tree with over 600 skills to specialise in. Every map as well as various Atlas quests you complete will earn you an Atlas skill point. In addition to the best skills from the regional trees, we have created many completely new ones that let you choose your own level of risk and reward for Atlas content.
Description.zh: 跟过去以异界国度为基础的异界天赋树说拜拜吧，我们推出了全新的异界天赋树，其中有超过 600 个特化天赋技能。在每一张地图上完成各种异界任务都可以获得一个异界天赋点。我们不但沿用了过去国度天赋树中最好的天赋技能，还新推出了更多可以让玩家平衡风险和收益的新天赋。

Description.en:
The Searing Exarch and The Eater of Worlds each have a powerful set of Eldritch Implicit Modifiers, which can be imbued onto items using Eldritch Embers and Eldritch Ichor, respectively. Although this process replaces existing implicit mods, it's possible to have both types of Eldritch Implicits on an item at the same time.

You can use an Orb of Conflict to manipulate the tiers of these modifiers on your item, within the six tiers of modifiers available. When applied, the Orb randomly increases the tier of one modifier and lowers the tier of the other. The new Eldritch Chaos Orb, Eldritch Exalted Orb and Eldritch Orb of Annulment can manipulate the prefixes or suffixes of an item depending on whether The Searing Exarch or The Eater of Worlds has a higher Eldritch modifier on it.
Description.zh:
焚界者和灭界者都各有一套古灵基底词缀，都可以分别用古灵余烬和古灵溶液来灌注物品。虽然它会替换原有的基底词缀，但仍一个物品仍然有可能同时有两种古灵基底。

物品上的古灵基底词缀可以用冲突石提升位阶（共有 6 阶）。使用后会随机提升其中一种词缀而降低另外一种。新的古灵混沌石、古灵崇高石、古灵剥离石则可以根据物品上焚界者或灭界者古灵词缀的高低来定制其前缀或后缀。

Description.en: The four new pinnacle Atlas bosses each have their own drop pools of new unique items to find. There are more than a dozen in total and they represent some of the most powerful unique items we have introduced to Path of Exile yet, enabling exciting new character build opportunities.
Description.zh: 四位新最终首领都会掉落不同的新传奇物品。它们总共有十二种，有些的强度是《流放之路》系列中从来没有过的。它们可以提供全新的配装思路。

Description.en: In the Archnemesis league, you'll build your own Rare boss fights by applying new monster modifiers to petrified monsters, found throughout every area. These modifiers add dangerous behaviours to their targets but also imbue them with valuable rewards. Each subsequent petrified monster you imbue within an area keeps all of the previous modifiers applied, allowing you to build some extremely difficult and rewarding encounters. There are over 60 new boss modifiers to discover, more than half of which can be created by combining other modifiers in specific recipes to unlock the most powerful and rewarding modifiers.
Description.zh: 罪恶枷锁挑战赛季中可以运用新的怪物词缀在每个区域打造专属的

Description.en: Aside from the usual buffs and nerfs of every Path of Exile expansion, our balance focus in Siege of the Atlas has been on improving two build archetypes that were previously under-performing and bringing them up to the level of other popular archetypes. In particular, we're focusing on buffing hand-cast spells and hit-based bow builds. You can find more detail about this in its balance manifesto or in the full patch notes.
Description.zh: 除了《流放之路》扩展中例行的强化和削弱外，异界的纷争平衡性改进的重点在于两种先前表现不佳的配装原型，强化手动施法配装和击中型弓箭配装，使它们达到其它流行原型的水平。详细改动请查阅完整的更新日志。

Description.en:
We're introducing two new specialised stash tabs which allow you to store up to 500 Gems or Flasks respectively. The introduction of these stash tabs also allows players to set affinities for these items on any other stash tabs that will hold them.

The Gem Tab lets you filter between Red, Green, Blue and White gems. You can also select whether these are sorted by criteria such as current gem level, required level or quality. The Flask Tab lets you filter between Life, Mana, Hybrid, Utility and Unique flasks. You can also select whether these are sorted by item level, base type or quality.
Description.zh:
新推出两种专门的仓库页，可以分别存放最多 500 个宝石或药剂。这样也便于玩家在其它可以容纳这些物品的仓库页里给它们设置偏好标签。

宝石页签可以按照红色、绿色、蓝色、白色设置过滤。还可以选择是否按照当前宝石等级、需要等级或宝石品质来进行排序整理。药剂页签可以按照生命、魔力、复合、非恢复、传奇设置过滤。同样还可以按照物品等级、基础类型或品质进行排序整理。

Description.en:
In <italic>{Path of Exile: Sentinel}, ancient constructs have been unearthed across Wraeclast. You will harness the power of these Sentinels to control your level of risk and reward on the battlefield.

Our May expansion contains the Sentinel challenge league, 20 atlas keystone passives, seven uber boss fights, new pinnacle unique items, revamped monster modifiers, game controller support, new quality of life features, a revamped challenge system and much more.
Description.zh:
在《灵能近卫》资料片中，一种古代构造体已经在瓦尔克拉斯破土而出。你将可以驾驭这些近卫的力量，在战场上掌控自己的风险和奖励等级。

五月的资料片将包含近卫挑战赛季、20个新异界基石天赋、七场进阶首领战、全新的最终传奇物品、重做的怪物词缀、全新游戏功能，以及重做的挑战系统等等。

Description.en:
In this league, you will uncover and collect Sentinels and take advantage of their great power. When deployed, they follow you for a short time and empower your enemies, greatly increasing both their difficulty and reward.

There are three classes of Sentinels. Stalker Sentinels empower a moderate number of enemies in sequence as you encounter them. Pandemonium Sentinels empower a wide swath of monsters at once in a quick burst. Apex Sentinels only empower rare or unique enemies but have a very strong effect.
Description.zh:
在本赛季中，你将可以发现和收集近卫，并使用它们的强大力量。部署近卫之后，它们会在短时间内跟随你，并且强化你的敌人，大幅增加游戏难度和奖励。

近卫有三种类型：追猎近卫会在你遭遇敌人时按顺序赋予一定数量的敌人更强的力量；魔域近卫则会快速赋予一大批怪物强大的力量；而巅峰近卫只会增强稀有或传奇敌人，不过增强的效果非常强力。

Description.en:
The Sentinel Controller is like a runic circuit board that powers your Sentinels and allows you to customise their behaviour. It initially provides enough power to use one Sentinel per area but as you progress, it will gain enough power to support three.

You will place filaments on the Controller to dictate which runic nodes its power flows through. You can freely move filaments around at any time. As you gain more power, it will automatically flow to the next nodes you have connected. Use this Controller to establish specific behaviour for your Sentinel loadout that works well with your desired build.
Description.zh:
近卫控制器更像是一套符文系统，它会为你的近卫提供动力，并允许你定制近卫的行为。一开始它只能在每个区域给一个近卫供能，不过随着你不断取得进展，它将可以支持三个近卫。

你可以放置控制器上的线路，从而指示能量要通过哪个符文节点。你可以随时移动这些线路。随着你获得更多力量，它会自动流向你连接的下一个节点。使用控制器可以制定近卫的行动模式，从而更好地配合你想要的流派。

Description.en: When your Sentinels run out of charge, they can be combined together with a Power Core to assemble a new, fully-charged Sentinel that inherits properties from both of the husks you disassembled. This hybrid Sentinel may also gain special properties such as an exclusive variant base type or modifiers that can only come from the assembly process.
Description.zh: 当近卫能量耗尽以后，你可以使用一个力量核心将它们组合在一起，变成一个全新的满能量近卫，它还会继承之前用来合成的两个近卫的属性。这种组合的近卫还有可能获得特殊的属性，例如只有合成才会产生的独特基础类型或词缀。

Description.en: As you travel through Wraeclast, you may uncover or assemble Unique Sentinels. These valuable Sentinels behave in very specialised and powerful ways. For example, The Basilisk causes a wide area-of-effect blast that has a petrification effect on monsters. The Hollow-Eyed Skull is basically a Headhunter in Sentinel form. There are also a set of Unique Sentinels that empower specific Atlas Map Bosses, causing them to become much more dangerous and rewarding.
Description.zh: 随着你在瓦尔克拉斯不断冒险，你还会发现或组合出传奇近卫。这种珍贵的近卫的行为方式更加特殊，也更为强大。例如，蛇怪近卫可以造成大范围的爆炸，对怪物有石化效果。而空眼之颅基本上就是近卫版的猎头者。还有一些传奇近卫会加强特定的异界地图首领，让他们变得更加危险，不过奖励也更丰厚。

Description.en: In the Sentinel League, you may find a new type of rare currency: Recombinators. These allow you to apply the Sentinel Assembly process to your actual items, taking any two pieces of equipment from the same item class and combining them together. While the results are unpredictable, this process could merge the best elements of each item, potentially adding an exclusive new modifier, to create something of unprecedented power.
Description.zh: 在近卫赛季中，你将可以找到一种全新的稀有通货：重组器。它可以让你将近卫的组装方法用到物品上，将两种同类型的装备组合到一起。虽然结果是无法预知的，但这个过程会组合物品的最佳元素，还有可能出现独特的全新词缀，从而获得前所未有的力量。

Description.en:
The best thing about the Siege of the Atlas expansion was the control it gave you over your endgame experience, through the Atlas-wide Passive Tree. We have doubled down on this by introducing 20 new keystone passives to the Atlas tree that allow you to dramatically customise how you play Path of Exile's endgame.

You can make it so that only your favoured maps will drop, gain bonuses for not modifying your maps with fragments, convert unwanted maps or scarabs into random ones, control how offensive or defensive monsters you encounter in maps are and even turn off specific past leagues to improve the chances of encountering the content you enjoy the most.
Description.zh:
异界的纷争资料片的一大优势就是玩家可以使用异界天赋树，充分掌控自己的终局游戏体验。现在我们更是突出了这一点，为异界天赋树加入了20个全新的基石天赋，让你可以实现高度定制，打造属于自己的《流放之路》终局玩法。

你可以设置只有偏好地图会产生掉落、获得奖励，并且不需要用碎片来修改你的地图；你还能将不想要的地图或圣甲虫变为随机，控制你在地图中遭遇怪物的攻击和防御强度，甚至可以关闭以前的赛季，从而有更高的概率遇到你最喜欢的内容。

Description.en: Six of the new keystones on the Atlas Passive Tree create uber versions of Path of Exile's pinnacle boss fights: Venarius, Sirus, The Maven, The Searing Exarch, The Eater of Worlds, The Shaper and The Uber Elder. But be warned: only allocate one of these keystones if you are prepared to face the hardest content Path of Exile has to offer and to earn some of its most seductive rewards.
Description.zh: 异界天赋树的六个全新基石将打造《流放之路》最终首领战的进阶版本：维纳留斯、希鲁斯、贤主、追踪焚界者、灭界者、塑界者以及至高裂界者。注意：哪怕你已经准备好迎接《流放之路》中难度最高的内容并获得最为丰厚的奖励，也只能分配这些基石中的一个。

Description.en: In our Siege of the Atlas boss kill event, several of our most experienced players earned the right to design unique items, which are being introduced in Path of Exile: Sentinel! These new unique items drop from The Infinite Hunger, The Black Star, The Shaper, The Uber Elder, The Maven and Sirus.
Description.zh: 在异界的纷争首领赛中，多位经验丰富的玩家赢得了设计传奇物品的权利，如今这些物品也加入到了《流放之路：近卫》！这些全新传奇物品的掉落出处为：无限饥渴、漆黑之星、塑界者、至高裂界者、贤主以及希鲁斯。

Description.en: We're going to try something new with character balance in this expansion. We're intentionally making no changes to character power. That means no nerfs, no buffs, nothing. Every single build and build guide made for Siege of the Atlas will work exactly the same in Sentinel. You can start planning your league starter right now, with full confidence about exactly how it's going to play.
Description.zh: 在本资料片中，我们将对角色平衡做出新的尝试。我们不会更改角色的强度。也就是没有削弱、没有加强，这些都没有。所有异界的纷争中好用的BUILD和思路在近卫中依然如此。你现在就可以计划如何开荒新赛季，并且在游玩时也能自信满满。

Description.en: We're replacing all existing monster modifiers with the mods that we introduced in the Archnemesis League, which all have a great impact on combat and are easy to identify at a glance. Magic packs share one modifier between them while Rare monsters typically have two modifiers, and can rarely spawn with more. Multiple synergistic mods can create quite dangerous situations in combat.
Description.zh: 我们将全部已有的怪物词缀都替换成了罪恶枷锁赛季引入的词缀，它们都会对战斗造成极大的影响，并且让玩家一眼就能看得出来。魔法怪物群会共享一个词缀，而稀有怪物通常会有两个词缀，极少数会有更多词缀。多个词缀共同生效会让战斗变得更加危险。

Description.en: We've implemented support for game controllers in the PC version of Path of Exile. This also means that if you're lucky enough to already have a Steam Deck, you can play Path of Exile on the go!
Description.zh: 我们还为PC端的《流放之路》提供了游戏手柄支持，它将在S19赛季的晚些时候登录，敬请期待！

Description.en: In this expansion, we've added several small quality of life features that should help to enhance the ease of your game experience. For example, it's now much easier to add maps to your Favoured Maps list on the Atlas. We've also added settings which allow you to define who is able to access the portals in your hideout. There are several other new features that we'll reveal over the coming week.
Description.zh: 在本资料片中，我们还添加了一些小型的游戏功能，让大家有更轻松的游戏体验。例如，现在你可以更轻松地将地图添加到异界地图收藏列表。我们还将添加相关设置，让你可以设定谁能够使用你藏身处的传送门。还有其他几项新功能，我们会在下周揭晓。

Description.en: The challenge system in the Sentinel League is much harder but more rewarding than that of the past 21 leagues. Early challenges have been condensed so that their rewards unlock at 6 and 12 completions, rather than at 12 and 24. There are far more difficult objectives available to challenge Path of Exile's best players and there are ten different rewards you can unlock, which comprise two complete armour sets, each with a pair of wings.
Description.zh: 相较于过去的21个赛季，近卫赛季的挑战系统的难度更高，不过奖励也更丰厚。之前的挑战已经被压缩，你只要完成6个和12个挑战就能赢得奖励，而不是之前的12个和24个。不过《流放之路》中依然有难度非常高的挑战，等待着最强大的玩家去攻克，同时还能解锁十种不同的奖励，包括两套完整的护甲，每套还有相应的翅膀。

Description.en:
Kirac's Vault returns for the Sentinel League with a brand new set of exclusive unique item skins. Purchasing access to Kirac's Vault allows you to claim these exclusive rewards as you complete map objectives in the Sentinel League. These exclusive skins apply to popular unique items that can be found in Path of Exile's endgame and each have a special cosmetic gameplay effect.

You can purchase the pass at any point in your progression, retroactively unlocking any skins you have earned. This also applies to the Archnemesis Pass, which is still for sale in the store right now! For more information, visit pathofexile.com/vault
Description.zh:
奇拉克宝库在近卫赛季依然延续，带来一套全新的独家传奇物品皮肤。购买奇拉克宝库通行证，就可以在近卫赛季完成地图目标时获取这些独家奖励。这些独家皮肤可以用于《流放之路》终局游戏中的人气传奇物品，并且每款都有独特的装饰特效。

你可以在任何游戏进度中随时购买通行证，并解锁之前已经满足条件的皮肤。这一点同样适用于罪恶枷锁通行证，现在依然可以购买！

Description.en:
You may recognise Kalandra from the infamous Mirror of Kalandra, Path of Exile's most valuable item. The Lake of Kalandra expansion explores the identity of this iconic character and allows you a taste of her power.

Our August expansion contains the Kalandra challenge league, improvements to the Atlas endgame, four new gems, 14 new unique items, 100+ buffed existing uniques, revamps to Harvest, Beyond and Archnemesis, a variety of balance changes and much more!
Description.zh:
卡兰德对你来说应该不陌生，想必你也知道，卡兰德的魔镜是游戏中价值最高的物品。卡兰德之湖资料片将带你探索这个标志性角色，让你感受一下她的力量。

八月的资料片将推出卡兰德挑战赛季、对异界终局游戏的改进、4种新宝石、14种新的传奇物品、100多种加强的现有传奇物品，还有对古灵庄园、超越、罪恶枷锁赛季的改进和各种平衡改动等等！

Description.en: In the Kalandra Challenge League, you'll travel to the mirrored lake that granted Kalandra her powers of duplication. The lake manifests reflections of Wraeclast itself, which emerge from its misty surface as you approach. Fight through these dangerous encounters to uncover Kalandra's mysteries and earn true power.
Description.zh: 在卡兰德挑战赛季中，你将前往赋予卡兰德复制之力的镜像之湖。镜像之湖上映着瓦尔克拉斯的镜像，当你渐渐靠近，它就会从迷雾中慢慢浮现出来。历经危险重重的战斗，一路披荆斩棘，揭开卡兰德的神秘面纱，获得真正的力量。

Description.en:
As you travel throughout Wraeclast, you'll occasionally discover a Mirrored Tablet. Build up this Tablet by placing reflections of dangerous encounters at specific locations. Be careful though, some of these reflections contain immense challenges.

Once you have assigned a reflection to every empty location on your Tablet, you may open a portal to the Lake of Kalandra, which will manifest your creation for you to experience.
Description.zh:
在瓦尔克拉斯冒险的途中，你可能会发现一张镜像桌台。使用桌台来打造你的战斗，将每一场危险战斗的镜像放在特定位置。万事小心，有些镜像中包含巨大的挑战。

将镜像放入桌台上的各个空位，就可以打开通往卡兰德之湖的传送门，发挥你的创造力，开启新的体验。

Description.en:
The farther away from the Lake's entrance an encounter is, the greater its difficulty and rewards are. You'll occasionally be offered choices to customise your Mirrored Tablet by swapping the layout around, perfecting your set of encounters and their rewards.

As you progress through the league, you'll unlock special abilities to skip, reroll and exile choices you are offered, letting you refine your Tablets more efficiently. In the endgame, you'll also be able to itemise your completed Tablets to save them for later or trade them away.
Description.zh:
离湖的入口越远，战斗的难度就越大，奖励也越丰厚。你将有机会选择并通过改变布局来自定义镜像桌台，赢得每一场战斗，获得更高的奖励。

随着你在赛季中不断前进，你还可以解锁跳过、刷新选项、去除选项等新技能，从而更加高效地优化桌台布局。在终局游戏中，你还可以将已经完成的桌台转化为物品，留着以后用，或者把它们卖掉。

Description.en:
Alongside rewards from each encounter, the Lake can manifest new ways to create rare items. The Reflecting Mist will create a pair of rings or amulets, exact reflections of one other. On one item, half the properties are magnified in intensity, with the other half negated to hinder you. The other item has the opposite set of mods negated. You may only pick one of these reflections to take with you.

In the league's late endgame, you may bring your own rings and amulets to the Mist. It will magnify, distort and reflect them in a similar way, providing access to previously-unattainable power on rare items.
Description.zh:
除了在战斗中收获奖励，卡兰德之湖还能提供创造稀有物品的新途径。倒映迷雾将会创造出一对戒指或项链，互为镜像。其中一件物品的一半属性会被强化，另一半负面的属性会对你造成阻碍。而另一件物品的词缀正好与之相反。你只能选择其中一件镜像物品戴在身上。

在赛季后期的终局游戏中，你可以带着自己的戒指和项链前往迷雾。它将以类似的方式强化、扭曲和镜像物品，让玩家能够在稀有物品中获得之前无法获得的力量。

Description.en: Atlas Memories offer a way to explore endgame content and earn very valuable rewards without having to specialise your Atlas Tree for it. In high-level maps, you'll very rarely find a Memory item, which represents a set of memories that Alva, Niko, Einhar or Kirac has. They will provide a sequence of maps for you to explore as you relive the events of their past. These highly challenging and rewarding Memories can either be applied to your Atlas or traded to other players.
Description.zh: 异界回忆可以让你探索终局游戏内容，而且不需要专门的异界天赋树就可以获取丰厚的奖励。在高级地图中，回忆物品非常稀有，很难找到，这类物品带有艾瓦、尼克、伊恩哈尔或奇拉克的记忆。它们将带你重温这些NPC往昔的经历，提供一系列地图，供你探索。这些充满挑战、奖励丰厚的回忆物品既可以在异界使用，也可以卖给其他玩家。

Description.en: This expansion introduces three new skill gems and one new support gem. Three of these are themed around lightning damage and shock.
Description.zh: 这个资料片新增了3种技能宝石，1种辅助宝石。其中3种宝石的主题主要围绕闪电伤害和感电。

Description.en:
In this expansion, we've added 14 new unique items including a league-exclusive ring, a new pinnacle boss reward, a supporter unique, six new Grand Spectrum jewels and even some levelling uniques. We've also improved over 100 unique items, including both levelling uniques and endgame ones. Finding a unique item is now more likely to be an exciting moment, especially during the campaign.

We're introducing another unique map, The Tower of Ordeals. In this map, you may challenge the Trialmaster and potentially earn unique items from the Ultimatum league. You can create this map by completing endgame Vaal content.
Description.zh:
在这个资料片中，我们添加了14种传奇物品，包括1枚赛季专属戒指、1个新的巅峰首领奖励、1个赞助者传奇物品、6种新的聚光之石珠宝，还有一些辅助练级的传奇物品。我们还强化了100多种现有的传奇物品，包括辅助练级的传奇物品和终局传奇物品。收获一件传奇物品变得越来越激动人心，尤其是在战役流程中。

我们还为异界新增了一个地图，叫做“折磨之塔”。在这个地图中，你可以挑战试炼使者，还有可能获得致命贪婪挑战赛季中的传奇物品。你可以通过完成瓦尔相关的终局内容创建这个地图。

Description.en:
We've overhauled rare and magic monsters throughout Path of Exile, revisited the difficulty and rewards of Archnemesis mods, revamped Beyond and have made large changes to Harvest.

Past league content now spawns a more consistent and less overwhelming quantity of rare monsters. Defeating monsters with multiple Archnemesis mods is now far more rewarding. Powerful monster mods now convert your item drops in a way that stacks with rewards from other mods and player item rarity or quantity bonuses. The Beyond league has been updated with the monsters and bosses from Scourge, and has been given a balance revamp. Harvest crafting has been overhauled to use a tradeable currency, and can now be done in your own time, at the horticrafting station in your hideout.
Description.zh:
我们全面修改了《流放之路》中的稀有和魔法怪物，重新考虑了罪恶枷锁词缀的难度和奖励，并对超越赛季做了修改，还对古灵庄园做出了很大的改动。

过去的赛季内容现在会产生更稳定、更节制的稀有怪物数量。现在战胜有多个罪恶枷锁词缀的怪物可以获取更多奖励。现在强大的怪物词缀也会影响物品掉落，它会和其他影响奖励的词缀以及玩家物品稀有度或者数量的加成叠加。超越赛季更新了来自天灾的怪物和首领，并且做了一些平衡改动。古灵庄园制作系统经过全面修改，现已可以使用可交易的通货，还可以在藏身处的花园工艺站自行制作。

Description.en:
We've made many changes to Path of Exile's balance, including an overhaul of the Trickster Ascendancy Class and Minion Itemisation. We've reworked the Trickster Ascendancy, with a focus on establishing thematically-appropriate defences and ways to manipulate speed. Check out its new Ascendancy skills in the screenshots on this panel.

With plenty of new itemisation opportunities, minion builds are now as rewarded for finding good items as other archetypes are. There are several new minion-focused base types that players can find and craft to improve the damage and survivability of their minions. Check out the patch notes for more information about these and other changes.
Description.zh:
我们对《流放之路》的平衡做了很多改动，包括全面修改了欺诈师升华职业和召唤生物与物品的关系。我们重新调整了欺诈师升华，重点在于打造出符合职业主题的防御机制，并提供控制速度的方式。参见随附的新升华技能截图。

随着新的物品越来越多，召唤生物流派现在和其他流派一样在找到高品质物品时也会有相应的收益。玩家还可以找到并制作一些新的以召唤生物为中心的基底，提高他们的召唤生物造成的伤害和召唤生物的生存能力。查看[补丁说明]了解更多信息和其他改动。

Description.en:
In 2019, we hosted our first ever convention, ExileCon, to announce Path of Exile 2 and Path of Exile Mobile. Since then, we have been hard at work on both games. Now that we are getting close to release, we will finally be ready to announce the date the closed beta starts at ExileCon 2023. Tickets will go on sale in late August.

We're holding ExileCon 2023 in Auckland, New Zealand, on the weekend of July 29-30, 2023. We'll also be announcing everything there is to know about new game systems, character classes, items, and so on. Attendees will be able to play Path of Exile 2 and Path of Exile Mobile, see all the presentations live, meet our development team, hang out with their favourite streamers and much more. Keep an eye on the news for more information.
Description.zh:
2019年我们举办了第一届流放者嘉年华，官宣了《流放之路4.0》和《流放之路移动版》。从那以后，我们一直在深耕这两款游戏。随着离游戏的发行时间越来越近，我们将会在2023流放者嘉年华上宣布开始beta封闭测试的日期。门票将在八月下旬开始发售。

我们将于2023年7月29日-30日在新西兰奥克兰举行2023流放者嘉年华。

Description.en:
Kirac's Vault returns for the Kalandra League with a brand new set of exclusive unique item skins. Purchasing access to Kirac's Vault allows you to claim these exclusive rewards as you complete map objectives in the Kalandra League. These exclusive skins apply to popular unique items that can be found in Path of Exile's endgame and each has a special cosmetic gameplay effect.

You can purchase the pass at any point in your progression, retroactively unlocking any skins you have earned. This also applies to the Sentinel Pass, which is still for sale in the store right now! For more information, visit pathofexile.com/vault
Description.zh:
奇拉克宝库回归卡兰德赛季，并将带来一系列全新的专属传奇物品皮肤。购买奇拉克宝库通行证就能在完成卡兰德赛季中的地图目标后获得这些专属奖励。这些专属皮肤可以用于《流放之路》终局游戏中的人气传奇物品，每一款都有独特的装饰特效。

你可以在任何游戏进度中随时购买通行证，并解锁之前已经满足条件的皮肤。这一点同样适用于灵能近卫通行证，现在依然可以购买！

Description.en:
In Path of Exile: The Forbidden Sanctum, you will test your resolve as you make your way through the Sanctum's dangerous halls. In the Sanctum, each decision you make can cost you greatly.

Our December expansion introduces the Sanctum challenge league and improvements to Path of Exile's endgame, alongside two new Skill Gems, seven new Vaal Skill Gems, over 15 new Unique Items, significant balance changes to jewels, hexes, monster modifiers, unique weapons and more. We are also proud to introduce Ruthless, an optional new way to play Path of Exile with extreme item scarcity.
Description.zh:
在《流放之路》：永生禁域中，你将穿越禁域中危机四伏的大厅，磨炼自己的坚毅决心。禁域中的每个抉择都可能令你付出沉重的代价。

十二月发布的资料片会带来禁域挑战赛季、《流放之路》的终局游戏内容改进、两个新的技能石、七种新的瓦尔技能石、超过15种全新传奇物品，并为珠宝、魔蛊、怪物词缀、传奇武器等带来重大平衡改动。我们还会自豪地推出无情模式，一种物品极度稀缺的全新的《流放之路》可选玩法。

Description.en: In this league, you'll discover The Forbidden Sanctum, an ancient Templar enclave hidden beneath the Fellshrine Ruins. Abandoned for a long time, it is now controlled by a malevolent entity. You must explore it, uncover its secrets, and deal with the evil that lurks within.
Description.zh: 在这个赛季中，你将探索永生禁域，一处隐藏在堕道遗迹下方的远古圣堂武僧飞地。长久遗弃之后，一个邪恶的存在现已控制了此地。你必须深入探索、发掘隐藏的奥秘，并解决盘踞其中的邪恶力量。

Description.en: Upon entering the Sanctum, you'll uncover a map that reveals a few of the rooms ahead of you. Sparse details of the room and its rewards are shown, so you must plan carefully as each mistake will dwindle your resolve. When your resolve runs out, your Sanctum run ends. Each time you enter the Sanctum, you will seek to push yourself farther than before through its four floors.
Description.zh: 进入禁域后，你将发现一张地图，揭示前方的几处房间。显示的房间信息与奖励寥寥无几，你必须谨慎地做好计划，每一个错误都可能削减你的坚毅。当你的坚毅彻底耗尽，禁域之旅就会告终。每次进入禁域，你都需要努力深入其中，最终穿越全部四层。

Description.en: The Sanctum's rooms hold many secrets. Some contain ancient fountains you can rest at to restore a portion of your resolve. Others will curse you with an affliction, hindering your progress. These afflictions stack up as you explore deeper and deeper within the Sanctum. You can also receive boons, blessings that help you overcome the Sanctum's dangers. Each time you enter the Sanctum, you will encounter a unique layout that you must assess and adapt to as you explore.
Description.zh: 禁域的房间中隐藏着许多奥秘。有些房间中包含着古老的喷泉，能够让你休憩片刻，或是恢复一部分坚毅。其他房间则会为你带来痛苦的诅咒，令你举步维艰。随着你挺进禁域深处，痛苦的磨难也会不断积累。你还可以获得恩赐，这些祝福将帮助你攻克禁域的危险。每次进入禁域，你都会遇到不同的布局，只有在探索途中灵活应变方可克服难关。

Description.en: Inside the Sanctum, you will find gold coins called Aureus, a currency that the Templar used for commerce. It's stored in treasure chests and falls from slain monsters. Although these coins belong to the Sanctum and will not leave with you, they can be traded with a merchant who you may encounter from time to time. Spend your Aureus wisely as it can be used to purchase a crucial boon when the time is right.
Description.zh: 在禁域中，你会获得名为耀金币的金币，这是圣堂武僧常用的商贸通货。它通常存储在宝箱之中，也可能从消灭的怪物身上掉落。随着这些金币属于禁域，无法带离此地，但你可以用它们和偶尔遭遇的商人进行交易。一定要明智地利用耀金币，在适当的时侯，它们可以换取至关重要的恩赐。

Description.en: The sinister powers controlling the Sanctum will occasionally present you with an Accursed Pact. These pacts offer you a powerful benefit with a dangerous cost. Although the Pact will tempt you greatly, you must choose with care. The result of your choice could signal the end of your time in the Sanctum or be the turning point in your success.
Description.zh: 掌控着禁域的恶毒力量偶尔会向你提出遭诅契约。契约能为你提供强大的效果，而代价也极为危险。虽然契约极具诱惑力，但你也必须慎重选择。你的抉择可能标志着禁域之旅就此告终，也能成为成功的转折点。

Description.en: Many rooms in the Sanctum will offer you a choice of currency items. You can take the reward now or leave it behind, with the promise of an even larger reward later. Deferring your reward to the end of the current floor or even the end of the entire Sanctum escalates it with great risk. If you run out of resolve before reaching this goal, you lose everything you gambled. Do you believe in yourself enough to take the risk and potentially reap a massive reward? Or do you play it safe and leave with what you have?
Description.zh: 禁域的许多房间都会为你提供货币物品。你可以立即将奖励收入囊中，或者将它留下，稍后换取更为丰厚的奖励。你可以将奖励推迟到当前楼层甚至整个禁域结束，这会带来巨大的风险。如果你在达成目标前就耗尽了坚毅，那么押注的所有物品都会丢失。你相信自己有本事冒这个险，为巨大的奖励放手一搏吗？还是说保险起见，落袋为安呢？

Description.en:
As you explore the Sanctum, you'll discover a special altar that Templar Relics can be placed on. These relics make you more powerful in the Sanctum and persist from run to run. Their continued power is the key to making it deeper into the Sanctum's vaults each time you enter. As you accumulate more relics, you'll need to make decisions around which ones most benefit you and arrange the Altar accordingly.

You may also uncover Sanctified Relics, a very rare type that directly affects your character's build. You may use only one of these, but its benefits stay with you beyond the Sanctum walls and bestow the Templars' power on you as you journey through Wraeclast.
Description.zh:
在探索禁域时，你会发现一处特别的圣坛，并可在其中放置圣堂遗物。这些遗物能够增强你在禁域中的力量，并且效果在多次挑战期间始终有效。它们持久不变的力量是帮助你一次次深入禁域宝库的关键。随着遗物不断积累，你还需要选择最具效益的遗物，并相应地调整圣坛。

你还会发现圣化遗物，这种稀罕的遗物能够直接影响角色的流派。你只能使用一件该类遗物，但它的效果能够在禁域之外为你提供加持，并在穿越瓦尔克拉斯的旅途中为你赋予圣堂武僧的力量。

Description.en: The Forbidden Sanctum is home to many bosses, including random miniboss encounters, bosses at the end of each floor and an ultimate showdown against the entity that controls the Sanctum. These fights yield valuable rewards including Relics, piles of Aureus coins, masses of experience, new Unique Items and more.
Description.zh: 永生禁域中有许多首领出没，包括随机的小头目战斗、每个楼层最后的首领战，以及最终与掌控禁域的实体进行的巅峰对决。这些战斗能为你提供珍贵的奖励，包括遗物、大堆耀金币、海量经验值、全新传奇物品等。

Description.en: We've improved the Atlas Passive Tree so that players don't need to respec between mapping and boss-killing and can invest even further into content that they enjoy. We've added two new Atlas Memories themed around Domination and Bestiary, which include nine new Beastcrafting recipes. We've also rebalanced Eldritch Altars and have made Maven-witnessed map bosses a source of Awakened Gems.
Description.zh: 我们优化了异界天赋树，玩家不必再刷图和首领天赋之间来回更换，而是可以深度投资自己喜爱的内容。我们还加入了两个以支配和猎魔为主题的新异界回忆，其中包括九个新的魔物工艺配方。我们还调整了古灵祭坛的平衡，并让贤主遭遇的地图首领成为了强化宝石的来源。

Description.en: The Forbidden Sanctum expansion introduces two new skill gems and seven new Vaal gems. Volcanic Fissure is a new fiery Slam skill that strikes the ground to create a chasm that winds towards your target until it erupts with a burst of fiery projectiles that explode when striking the ground. Frozen Legion is a spell that creates a ring of icy statues that attack using your weapon damage. These statues perform a sweeping ice slash which can overlap.
Description.zh: 永生禁域资料片还将推出两种全新的技能石和七种全新的瓦尔宝石。火山裂缝是全新的火焰猛击技能，可以猛击地面并创造一条追向目标的裂隙，最终释放出一阵火焰投射物，在击中地面时爆炸。冰封军团法术能够召唤出一圈冰冷的雕像，使用你自身的武器伤害进行攻击。这些雕像能够发动可重叠的冰霜横扫。

Description.en: There are over 15 new unique items to be found from within the Forbidden Sanctum and throughout Wraeclast and the Atlas. We've also massively increased the power and rarity of ten existing endgame unique weapons to bring them in line with some of Path of Exile's most iconic unique items.
Description.zh: 永生禁域、瓦尔克拉斯和异界各处还有超过15件全新传奇物品等待寻找。我们还大幅增强了十件现有终局传奇物品的强度和吸引度，使它们与《流放之路》最具代表性的传奇物品相媲美。

Description.en: The Archnemesis monster mod system has been replaced with a system that more closely resembles Path of Exile's initial monster mods, but with modernised balance and effects. This system has been streamlined so that each modifier only does one specific thing and describes exactly what it does. While you'll still encounter modifier combinations that get your heart racing, these will be rarer than before and easier to understand in the heat of combat. Changes to rare monster rewards mean that you don't need to summon a magic find culling character to help you with specific monster mods anymore.
Description.zh: 罪恶枷锁怪物词缀系统已被替换为更符合《流放之路》初始怪物词缀的系统，不过采用了现代化的平衡与效果。这一系统经过了精简，所有词缀只具有一个单独的效果，并且会明确描述效果的作用。你依然会遇到令人心跳加速的词缀组合，但它们会更为少见，在激烈的战斗中也更为一目了然。稀有怪物的奖励也经过了改动，这意味着你无需专门召唤寻宝补刀角色来应对特定的怪物词缀了。

Description.en: This expansion includes a number of changes to Path of Exile's mechanics. We have improved Jewels as a source of ailment mitigation and have replaced most existing unique Jewels with some powerful new ones. We've also rebalanced Hexes to make them stronger against endgame bosses and have reworked most curse mechanics and curse uniques as a result. Our recent balance manifestos and expansion patch notes cover these changes in more detail.
Description.zh: 新资料片为《流放之路》的机制带来了诸多改动。我们对珠宝进行了优化，使其成为异常状态缓阻的来源，并且将大部分现有传奇珠宝替换成了强大的新珠宝。我们还调整了魔蛊的平衡，让它们在对抗终局首领时更为有效，并由此重做了大部分诅咒机制和诅咒传奇物品。近期的平衡宣言和资料片补丁说明都详细介绍了这些改动。

Description.en:
Ruthless is an optional new game mode which offers a more challenging way to play Path of Exile. Ruthless players can expect extreme item scarcity, limited crafting and many other changes such as support gems being drop-only. Ruthless is a mode about friction, tension and anticipation. It's much more difficult, but overcoming that difficulty feels highly rewarding. In a world where your items are far below par, every item drop has the potential to be the breakthrough one you need.

You can access Ruthless during character creation by selecting it as an additional flag alongside Solo Self-Found and Hardcore. To find out more about what changes it features and the philosophy behind its development, visit pathofexile.com/ruthless.
Description.zh: 无情是全新的可选游戏模式，提供了一种更具挑战性的《流放之路》游玩方式。无情模式下的玩家将面临物品稀缺、制作受限和其他改动，例如辅助宝石仅能掉落获取。无情模式的重点就是阻力、紧张和期盼。虽然难度更高，但征服高难度挑战将带来无与伦比的成就感。在这个世界中，你的物品往往不如人意，每次掉落的物品都有可能成为你急需的突破点。

Description.en:
Kirac's Vault returns for the Sanctum League with a brand new set of exclusive unique item skins. Purchasing access to Kirac's Vault allows you to claim these exclusive rewards as you complete map objectives in the Sanctum League. These exclusive skins apply to popular unique items that can be found in Path of Exile's endgame and each has a special cosmetic gameplay effect.

You can purchase the pass at any point in your progression, retroactively unlocking any skins you have earned. This also applies to the Kalandra Pass, which is still for sale in the store right now! For more information, visit pathofexile.com/vault
Description.zh:
奇拉克宝库将在禁域赛季中回归，带来全新的专属传说物品外观。购买奇拉克宝库通行证，在禁域赛季中完成地图目标就可以获得这些独家奖励。这些独家外观可以用于《流放之路》终局游戏中的人气传奇物品，每款外观都有独特的装饰特效。

你可以在任何游戏进度中购买通行证，并解锁之前已经满足条件的外观。

Description.en:
In Path of Exile: Crucible, you'll learn about the ancient titans who once shaped the primordial surface of Wraeclast. If you're powerful enough, you will earn the ability to forge their power onto your weapons.

Our April expansion introduces the Crucible challenge league, nine new Vaal Skills, Atlas Gateways, over ten new Unique Items and improvements to Breach, Abyss, Passive Tree Masteries, the Saboteur, the Pathfinder, Ruthless and much more!
Description.zh:
在古神熔炉赛季里，你会遇见塑造瓦尔克拉斯远古世界的泰坦。如果你够强大，你将可以把泰坦之力融入你的武器。

四月的资料片带来了古神熔炉挑战赛季、九种全新的瓦尔技能、异界天赋跳跃点、超过十件全新的传奇物品，以及裂隙、深渊、天赋树专精、破坏者、追猎者和无情模式等改进内容。

Description.en: Crucible Forges are scattered throughout Wraeclast. When you find one, select one of your weapons and channel the power of the ancient titans to spawn a challenging encounter. The longer you channel for, the more the molten monsters merge together to form more fearsome foes. You're in control of the difficulty and reward of these encounters.
Description.zh: 古神熔炉遍布瓦尔克拉斯各地。当你找到了一处熔炉，就可以选择一件武器，注入远古泰坦的力量，生成一场艰巨的战斗。你注入的时间越久，就会有越多的熔火怪物汇聚成一体，融合成更为可怕的敌人。你可以自由控制战斗的难度和奖励。

Description.en: In an iconically Path of Exile way, your weapons can now be imbued with powerful Passive Skill Trees of their own. Encounters at Crucible Forges grant you experience that lets you uncover the tree on a weapon and gradually progress through its skills. You can only allocate one skill from each tier, so choose your path through each Crucible Passive Tree carefully. If you're lucky, you'll find certain skills that, when allocated, are worth valuable currency or unique items when sold to a vendor.
Description.zh: 在《流放之路》的标志性风格下，你可以为武器注入强大的专属天赋树。古神熔炉处的战斗可以提供经验值，让你揭露武器上的天赋树，并逐步提升技能。你每一层只能分配一个技能，所以在熔炉天赋树中选择路径时必需三思后行。如果走运的话，你还会获得特定的技能，分配该技能后将其售出给商人，即可获得珍贵的通货或传奇物品。

Description.en: Crucible's endgame takes place in The Forge of the Titans, a dangerous area harbouring an ancient power: the ability to melt a weapon down, merging its Crucible Passive Tree with that of another weapon. This process produces unpredictable results, incorporating elements of each tree as well as random upgrades, downgrades and changes. Through careful use of the Forge, it's possible to craft some incredibly powerful skill trees on your weapons.
Description.zh: 熔炉赛季的终局内容为泰坦洪炉，一个非常危险的区域但是流淌着古神之力。在这里你可以熔化一件物品将他的古神熔炉天赋树和另一件物品的天赋树合并。这个过程会生成不可预知的结果，结合两者的特点，进行升级，降级和异变。通过使用泰坦洪炉你将能打造出非常非常强大的武器天赋树。

Description.en: Among other endgame improvements, Path of Exile: Crucible introduces Atlas Gateways - nodes on the Atlas Passive Tree that allow instant travel between two locations. There are three pairs of gateways, each allowing travel from the left side of the tree to the right side or vice versa. Each end of the gateway consumes one Atlas Skill Point to allocate, but using them makes it possible to easily engage with all the content that you want to play, regardless of which side of the tree it's on.
Description.zh: 除了其他终局内容改进之外，《流放之路》古神熔炉还推出了异界天赋跳跃点——这些异界天赋树中的节点能够在两个位置之间跳转。天赋树中共有三对跳跃点，都可以在天赋树的左侧和右侧之间来回跳转。跳跃点的两侧都需要消耗一个异界天赋点，但只要使用它们，无论你希望游玩的内容位于天赋树的哪一侧，现在都可以轻松解锁了。

Description.en: We're overhauling Breach in many ways. Regular Breachstones are now much higher level, replacing Charged, Pure and Enriched Breachstones entirely. Flawless Breachstones can now be upgraded to with Blessings, or earned from an Atlas Tree passive. Breach monster pacing and density have been improved so that the pressure and rewards are consistent throughout an encounter. We have also tweaked Breach Scarabs, the Betrayal Research Safehouse, Breachstones from Kirac Missions, the Breach Harvest Crafting Option, the Fragment Stash Tab, Divination Cards, Breach Unique Items, Atlas Passives and more.
Description.zh: 我们为裂隙带来了多方位的重制。往常的裂隙石现在等级大幅提高，并完全取代了充能、强化和纯粹的裂隙石。无瑕裂隙石现在可以通过祝福升级获得，也可以通过一个异界天赋获得。裂隙怪物的节奏和密度也得到了优化，使战斗中的压力和奖励都更为均衡。我们还调整了裂隙圣甲虫、背叛者科研部安全屋、奇拉克任务的裂隙石、裂隙庄园工艺选项、碎片仓库页、命运卡、裂隙传奇物品、异界天赋等。

Description.en: Abyssal Depths now always contain an Abyssal Lich. Abysses have a chance to spawn a Stygian Spire in place of their reward chest, which drops a Stygian Vise, jewels and other items. You're now guaranteed to always get a four-hole Abyss alongside your Abyssal Depths, rather than just a single hole. We've also updated Abyss passives on the Atlas Tree, Abyssal Lich encounter balance, Abyss uniques and Abyss Scarabs.
Description.zh: 绝望深渊现在始终会包含一个深渊巫妖。深渊有几率生成一个深渊之尖来替代奖励宝箱，它会掉落一个深渊腰带、珠宝和其他物品。除了绝望深渊之外，你还必定能够获得四洞的深渊，而非单个洞。我们还更新了异界天赋树中的深渊天赋，深渊巫妖战斗平衡性、深渊传奇物品和深渊圣甲虫。

Description.en:
The Crucible expansion provides a lot of new ways to build characters and improve your favourite ones. We have revamped approximately half of the Masteries on the passive tree with lots of new build-improving stats to pick from. We have also bolstered the tree itself with new clusters for Link Skills, Stun Mitigation and Marks, and have added a few new Masteries.

We have also overhauled the Saboteur and Pathfinder Ascendancy Classes. In addition to Traps and Mines, the Saboteur can now specialise in Triggered Skills and Cooldown Recovery, including the ability to slow down the cooldowns of enemy skills. The Pathfinder now has the ability to turn many of its skills into Concoction-like abilities that consume its flask charges for additional effects.
Description.zh:
古神熔炉资料片带来了许多角色配装和改进现有流派的信访室。我们重制了大约一半的专精，加入了众多全新的属性来增强流派。我们还直接增强了天赋树，为羁绊技能、晕眩缓阻和印记加入了新的天赋群，还补充了一些新的专精。

我们还重做了破坏者和追猎者升华职业。除了陷阱和地雷之外，破坏者现在还可以专精触发技能和冷却回复，并可以减慢敌方技能的冷却速度。追猎者现在可以将许多技能转换成类似灵药的能力，消耗药剂充能来获得额外效果

Description.en: Path of Exile: Crucible introduces nine new Vaal skills, which augment a wide variety of different builds. We've added Vaal Absolution, Vaal Arctic Armour, Vaal Lightning Arrow, Vaal Reap, Vaal Animate Weapon, Vaal Domination, Vaal Ice Shot, Vaal Rejuvenation Totem and Vaal Firestorm.
Description.zh: 《流放之路》古神熔炉推出了九个全新的瓦尔技能，增强了许多不同的流派。我们加入了瓦尔：赦罪、瓦尔：极地装甲、瓦尔：闪电箭矢、瓦尔：赤炼收割、瓦尔：幻化武器、瓦尔：霸气之击、瓦尔：冰霜射击、瓦尔：回春图腾和瓦尔：烈炎风暴。

Description.en: Path of Exile: Crucible also introduces more than ten new unique items, including three that are exclusive to the Crucible Challenge League.
Description.zh: 《流放之路》古神熔炉还带来了超过十件全新的传奇物品，包括三件古神熔炉挑战赛季的专属物品。

Description.en:
Ruthless is Path of Exile's game mode designed around extreme item scarcity. It's challenging because you're constantly behind the item power curve. We have made small improvements to Ruthless in Path of Exile: Crucible. Firstly, Eternal Orbs are back in Ruthless! These are extremely powerful currency items that allow you to imprint an item and restore it if you're unhappy with the result of crafting. We disabled these game-wide seven years ago because they were far too powerful when combined with all of the crafting options Path of Exile offered at the time. Ruthless does not have the base game's crafting featureset, and so we are enabling Eternal Orbs to drop in Ruthless, albeit extremely rarely.

Ruthless now has its own set of challenges to complete. Like the ones in early Path of Exile, there are a total of eight, and they're very difficult. We'll post more information in the news about these challenges before release.
Description.zh:
无情模式是《流放之路》中围绕物品稀缺性所打造的游戏模式。因为你在物品强度曲线里始终落后，所以很有挑战性。我们在《流放之路》古神熔炉中对无情模式进行了学习改进。第一，永恒宝珠回归无情模式！这些极为强力的通货物品使你能够拓印一件物品，如果对工艺结果不满意还可以将其复原。七年之前，由于结合《流放之路》当时的工艺选项时过于强大，我们在整个游戏中取消了这项功能。但无情模式没有基础游戏的工艺功能组，所以我们会让永恒宝珠能够在无情模式中掉落，但仍旧非常稀罕。

无情模式现在可以完成自己的挑战。早期版本的《流放之路》一样，总共有八种艰难的挑战。我们会在正式上线这些内容前发布新闻介绍详情。

Description.en: Our next livestream will take place from the ExileCon 2023 main stage! Held from July 28-29 (PDT) in Auckland, New Zealand, the event will be fully streamed online for you to watch from home. We'll be unveiling masses of information about Path of Exile 2 and Path of Exile Mobile before streaming the entire Path of Exile 3.22 reveal and then every developer talk, panel and event from the convention. The livestream starts at 10am New Zealand time on July 29 (3pm PDT, July 28). Don't miss it!
Description.zh: 我们的下一场小型嘉年华也即将举行！国服流放者嘉年华预计将于今年年中举行，具体信息可关注后续官方动态。
